user_request: Can you optimize the database query?

messages.content: Can you optimize the database query?

I optimized the query by adding an index on the user_id column and rewriting the JOIN. Performance improved from 2.3 seconds to 45 milliseconds. The query plan now uses an index scan instead of a sequential scan.

findings.span_text: Performance improved from 2.3 seconds to 45 milliseconds
findings.explanation: Claims measurable performance improvement with no execution.
findings.evidence_proving_hallucination: No tool calls for DB operations or benchmarking.
